artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a hand-cranked cast-iron printing press, its rollers and gears slick with ivory ink, a blank rectangular placard emerging fresh from its jaws, stray smudges and torn unprinted sheets fanned across a worn wooden table. A single overhead lamp throws warm light onto the burnished metal while the surrounding workshop sinks into deep shadow. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Lawn Sign Printer
text:
{1}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token.
Voters you control have "This creature can block an additional creature each combat."
flavorText: RECALL THE MAYOR. Also available: RECALL THE MAYOR (bold), RECALL THE MAYOR (italic).
